name: Top-Face Dice Arithmetic
description: Route three independently oriented dice through occluding foundry rails, rotate the table view, and settle the displayed top-face sum on the scale docks.
natural_language: Route all three foundry dice to their scale docks, rotate the table at least once, and settle the displayed top-face sum.

metadata.notes: Three-die foundry scale with exact orientation algebra, table-relative controls, occluding housings, scanner pads, solver-backed target generation, deterministic balance settling, and independent transcript replay.
